templates.name: Security Incident
templates.template:
Hi {customer_name},

Thank you for reporting this security concern. We take all security reports seriously.

Immediate actions taken:
1. Your report has been escalated to our Security Team (SLA: 1 hour acknowledgment)
2. We've flagged the associated accounts for review
3. You will receive updates every 4 hours until resolution

Please do not share any credentials via email. If you suspect account compromise, reset your password immediately.

Best regards,
Security Team
